parents.subject: LU-12345 docs: add '%k' format to lfs-find.1 man page

commit.subject: LU-9680 utils: make cYAML support more types of booleans
commit.message:
LU-9680 utils: make cYAML support more types of booleans

Currently cYAML only supports all lower case "true" and "false"
but by default libyaml returns similar values with the first
letter capitalized. This can cause yaml config files created
with the latest LNet stack to fail on older lustre versions.
To resolve this add support for the default libyaml boolean
to cYAML handling.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Change-Id: Ifc6a9cfc486aba8685f5df47c1fdba62c556e23d
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60743
Reviewed-by: Frank Sehr <fsehr@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
